prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, bright and polished anime aesthetic. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, stands at a wooden table holding a heavy leather-bound ledger. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, approaches and stands beside Mira. Mira opens the ledger, pointing to a page, and Ari leans in to inspect the document with an alert expression. Soft, warm lighting, bustling guild atmosphere, fluid camera movement, no text, no watermark.

Continuous shot of the same Japanese fantasy guild hall. Ari Ironleaf points to a specific coordinate on the ledger's map page. Mira Ledgerfall nods in professional agreement, takes a quill, and marks the route on the paper. They share a brief, confident nod of mutual understanding, closing the ledger together. Consistent characters, lighting, camera angle, and background, no text, no watermark.
